div.h1: File Descriptor Table During Pipeline Setup
div.p: cmd1 | cmd2 | cmd3 — Before and After dup2() and close()

g.text: PHASE 1: Initial State (After fork, before dup2)
PHASE 2: After dup2() and close() in Children

div.p: If any pipe write-end (e.g., fd4) remains open in the Parent or in Child 2, Child 2 will never receive EOF on its stdin. The read() loop in cmd2 will hang indefinitely waiting for data that will never arrive because the reference count > 0.
Cleanup Rule: Parent must close ALL pipe ends to allow EOF signals.
